vocab.example: I always looked up to my history teacher because of his vast knowledge and charismatic way of storytelling.

vocab.meaning: làm cho ai đó hiểu hoặc chấp nhận điều gì (truyền tải kiến thức hiệu quả)
vocab.example: She was the only educator who could truly get through to me when I was struggling with complex algebraic equations.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy, làm bộc lộ (khả năng hoặc phẩm chất tốt)
vocab.example: My literature teacher really brought out the best in my writing, encouraging me to enter several national competitions.

vocab.meaning: dần dần được hiểu ra, thấm nhuần (kiến thức)
vocab.example: He had a way of explaining difficult concepts so clearly that they would finally sink in after just one lesson.

vocab.meaning: nổi bật, khác biệt (so với những giáo viên khác)
vocab.example: What made her stand out from other faculty members was her genuine interest in her students' mental well-being.
He was passionate about passing on his love for classical music to the younger generation.

vocab.meaning: chọn ra, chú ý đặc biệt đến ai đó
vocab.example: My art teacher singled me out for extra tutoring because she saw a spark of creativity that I hadn't noticed myself.

vocab.meaning: dựa vào (kiến thức/kỹ năng đã được dạy khi gặp khó khăn)
vocab.example: Even now, I often fall back on the study techniques my biology teacher taught me back in high school.

vocab.meaning: dạy đi dạy lại cho đến khi nhớ kỹ (thường là quy tắc hoặc kỷ luật)
vocab.example: Our English teacher drummed the importance of proper grammar into us until it became second nature.

vocab.meaning: đạt tới tiêu chuẩn/kỳ vọng (so sánh các giáo viên sau này với người yêu thích)
vocab.example: None of my university professors quite measured up to the high standards set by my favorite high school mentor.
